name: Chocodiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all cookie ingredients except flour and salt; blend well.
3. Stir in flour and salt; mix well.
4. Press dough into an ungreased square cake pan.
5. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes until lightly golden brown.
6. Cool slightly.
7. In a medium saucepan, melt chocolate chips over low heat.
8. Stir in 1/3 cup peanut butter and corn flakes.
9. Spread over the slightly cooled base.
10. Cool slightly and cut into bars.
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: 15 minutes
